sq: \"square\",\n178\t  st: \"street\",\n179\t  ave: \"avenue\",\n180\t  av: \"avenue\",\n181\t  blvd: \"boulevard\",\n182\t  pkwy: \"parkway\",\n183\t  rd: \"road\",\n184\t  dr: \"drive\",\n185\t  ln: \"lane\",\n186\t  ct: \"court\",\n187\t  pl: \"place\",\n188\t  hwy: \"highway\",\n189\t  expwy: \"expressway\",\n190\t  bway: \"broadway\",\n191\t  \"'way\": \"way\",\n192\t};\n193\t\n194\tfunction expandAbbreviations(term: string): string {\n195\t  const lower = term.toLowerCase();\n196\t  if (ABBREVIATIONS[lower]) {\n197\t    return ABBREVIATIONS[lower];\n198\t  }\n199\t  let expanded = term;\n200\t  for (const [abbr, full] of Object.entries(ABBREVIATIONS)) {\n201\t    const regex = new RegExp(`\\\\b${abbr}\\\\b`, \"gi\");\n202\t    expanded = expanded.replace(regex, full);\n203\t  }\n204\t  return expanded;\n205\t}\n206\t\n207\tfunction normalizeForSearch(str: string): string {\n208\t  return str\n209\t    .toLowerCase()\n210\t    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\\s]/g, \"\")\n211\t    .replace(/\\s+/g, \" \")\n212\t    .trim();\n213\t}\n214\t\n215\tfunction stationMatchesQuery(\n216\t  station: Station,\n217\t  normalizedQuery: string,\n218\t  originalQuery: string\n219\t): boolean {\n220\t  const normalizedName = normalizeForSearch(station.name);\n221\t  const expandedQuery = normalizeForSearch(expandAbbreviations(originalQuery));\n222\t  const expandedNormalizedQuery = normalizeForSearch(expandAbbreviations(normalizedQuery));\n223\t\n224\t  if (\n225\t    normalizedName.includes(normalizedQuery) ||\n226\t    normalizedName.includes(expandedQuery) ||\n227\t    normalizedName.includes(expandedNormalizedQuery)\n228\t  ) {\n229\t    return true;\n230\t  }\n231\t\n232\t  const upperQuery = originalQuery.toUpperCase();\n233\t  if (station.lines.some((line) => line === upperQuery)) {\n234\t    return true;\n235\t  }\n236\t\n237\t  const expandedName = normalizeForSearch(expandAbbreviations(station.name));\n238\t  if (expandedName.includes(expandedQuery) || expandedName.includes(expandedNormalizedQuery)) {\n239\t    return true;\n240\t  }\n241\t\n242\t  return false;\n243\t}\n244\t\n245\tfunction scoreSearchResult(station: Station, query: string): number {\n246\t  const normalizedQuery = normalizeForSearch(query);\n247\t  const normalizedName = normalizeForSearch(station.name);\n248\t  const upperQuery = query.toUpperCase();\n249\t\n250\t  if (station.lines.some((line) => line === upperQuery)) {\n251\t    return 1000;\n252\t  }\n253\t\n254\t  if (normalizedName.startsWith(normalizedQuery)) {\n255\t    return 100;\n256\t  }\n257\t\n258\t  const words = normalizedName.split(/\\s+/);\n259\t  if (words.some((word) => word.startsWith(normalizedQuery))) {\n260\t    return 50;\n261\t  }\n262\t\n263\t  if (normalizedName.includes(normalizedQuery)) {\n264\t    return 10;\n265\t  }\n266\t\n267\t  return 1;\n268\t}\n269\t\n270\tfunction buildStationToComplexMap(complexes: ComplexIndex): Map<string, StationComplex> {\n271\t  const map = new Map<string, StationComplex>();\n272\t  for (const complex of Object.values(complexes)) {\n273\t    for (const stationId of complex.stations) {\n274\t      map.set(stationId, complex);\n275\t    }\n276\t  }\n277\t  return map;\n278\t}\n279\t\n280\t/**\n281\t * index\n284\t * @param transfers        Pre-loaded transfer connections\n285\t * @param webDistPath      Absolute path to the built React PWA (packages/web/dist)\n286\t */\n287\t/** Cache header for immutable assets (hashed filenames) */\n288\tconst IMMUTABLE_CACHE_HEADER = \"public, max-age=31536000, immutable\";\n289\t\n290\t/**\n291\t * Compression middleware for API responses.\n292\t * Supports brotli, gzip, and deflate based on Accept-Encoding header.\n293\t * Brotli is preferred for best compression ratio.\n294\t */\n295\tfunction compressionMiddleware(): MiddlewareHandler {\n296\t  return async (c, next) => {\n297\t    await next();\n298\t\n299\t    const body = c.res.body;\n300\t    if (!body || c.res.headers.get(\"Content-Encoding\")) return;\n301\t\n302\t    const contentType = c.res.headers.get(\"Content-Type\");\n303\t    if (!contentType?.includes(\"json\") && !contentType?.includes(\"text\")) return;\n304\t\n305\t    const acceptEncoding = c.req.header(\"Accept-Encoding\") || \"\";\n306\t    const contentLength = c.res.headers.get(\"Content-Length\");\n307\t\n308\t    // Skip small responses (not worth compressing)\n309\t    if (contentLength && parseInt(contentLength, 10) < 500) return;\n310\t\n311\t    // Clone response to get the body as buffer\n312\t    const buffer = Buffer.from(await c.res.clone().arrayBuffer());\n313\t\n314\t    // Prefer brotli for best compression, then gzip, then deflate\n315\t    if (acceptEncoding.includes(\"br\")) {\n316\t      const brotlied = await new Promise<Buffer>((resolve, reject) => {\n317\t        const chunks: Buffer[] = [];\n318\t        const brotli = createBrotliCompress();\n319\t        brotli.on(\"data\", (chunk) => chunks.push(chunk));\n320\t        brotli.on(\"end\", () => resolve(Buffer.concat(chunks)));\n321\t        brotli.on(\"error\", reject);\n322\t        brotli.end(buffer);\n323\t      });\n324\t\n325\t      c.res = new Response(brotlied, {\n326\t        status: c.res.status,\n327\t        headers: c.res.headers,\n328\t      });\n329\t      c.res.headers.set(\"Content-Encoding\", \"br\");\n330\t      c.res.headers.delete(\"Content-Length\");\n331\t    } else if (acceptEncoding.includes(\"gzip\")) {\n332\t      const gzipped = await new Promise<Buffer>((resolve, reject) => {\n333\t        const chunks: Buffer[] = [];\n334\t        const gzip = createGzip();\n335\t        gzip.on(\"data\", (chunk) => chunks.push(chunk));\n336\t        gzip.on(\"end\", () => resolve(Buffer.concat(chunks)));\n337\t        gzip.on(\"error\", reject);\n338\t        gzip.end(buffer);\n339\t      });\n340\t\n341\t      c.res = new Response(gzipped, {\n342\t        status: c.res.status,\n343\t        headers: c.res.headers,\n344\t      });\n345\t      c.res.headers.set(\"Content-Encoding\", \"gzip\");\n346\t      c.res.headers.delete(\"Content-Length\");\n347\t    } else if (acceptEncoding.includes(\"deflate\")) {\n348\t      const deflated = await new Promise<Buffer>((resolve, reject) => {\n349\t        const chunks: Buffer[] = [];\n350\t        const deflate = createDeflate();\n351\t        deflate.on(\"data\", (chunk) => chunks.push(chunk));\n352\t        deflate.on(\"end\", () => resolve(Buffer.concat(chunks)));\n353\t        deflate.on(\"error\", reject);\n354\t        deflate.end(buffer);\n355\t      });\n356\t\n357\t      c.res = new Response(deflated, {\n358\t        status: c.res.status,\n359\t        headers: c.res.headers,\n360\t      });\n361\t      c.res.headers.set(\"Content-Encoding\", \"deflate\");\n362\t      c.res.headers.delete(\"Content-Length\");\n363\t    }\n364\t  };\n365\t}\n366\t\n367\t/**\n368\t * Check if a path has a content hash (for immutable caching).\n369\t * Vite produces files like: assets/index-a1b2c3d4.js\n370\t */\n371\tfunction isHashedAsset(path: string): boolean {\n372\t  // Match pattern: /assets/name-[hash].ext where hash is 8+ hex chars\n373\t  return /\\/assets\\/[^/]+-[a-f0-9]{8,}\\.(js|css|svg|png|jpg|ico|woff2?)$/i.test(path);\n374\t}\n375\t\n376\texport function createApp(\n377\t  stations: StationIndex,\n378\t  routes: RouteIndex,\n379\t  complexes: ComplexIndex,\n380\t  transfers: Record<string, TransferConnection[]>,\n381\t  webDistPath: string\n382\t): Hono {\n383\t  const app = new Hono();\n384\t\n385\t  // Security headers on all responses (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy)\n386\t  // CSP includes report-uri for violation monitoring at /api/security/csp-report\n387\t  app.use(\n388\t    \"*\",\n389\t    securityHeaders({\n390\t      reportUri: \"/api/security/csp-report\",\n391\t    })\n392\t  );\n393\t\n394\t  // Security logging for all requests (OWASP A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures)\n395\t  // Logs authentication failures, authorization failures, rate limit exceeded, and blocked attacks\n396\t  app.use(\"*\", securityLogging());\n397\t\n398\t  // HTTP method restrictions (OWASP A01, A05)\n399\t  // Blocks dangerous HTTP methods (TRACE, CONNECT) that could be used for attacks\n400\t  app.use(\"*\", httpMethodRestrictions());\n401\t\n402\t  // HTTP Request Smuggling protection (OWASP A01, A03)\n403\t  // Detects and blocks request smuggling attempts\n404\t  app.use(\"*\", httpRequestSmuggling());\n405\t\n406\t  // HTTP Response Splitting protection (OWASP A01, A03)\n407\t  // Detects and blocks CRLF injection attempts\n408\t  app.use(\"*\", httpResponseSplitting());\n409\t\n410\t  // Host header protection to prevent cache poisoning and password reset poisoning\n411\t  // In production, set ALLOWED_HOSTS environment variable to restrict allowed hosts\n412\t  const isProduction = process.env[\"NODE_ENV\"] === \"production\";\n413\t  const allowedHosts = process.env[\"ALLOWED_HOSTS\"]\n414\t    ? process.env[\"ALLOWED_HOSTS\"].split(\",\")\n415\t    : undefined;\n416\t  app.use(\n417\t    \"*\",\n418\t    hostHeaderProtection({\n419\t      allowedHosts,\n420\t      blockMissingHost: isProduction, // Only require Host header in production\n421\t      blockIpAddresses: isProduction,\n422\t      blockPrivateNetworks: isProduction,\n423\t      blockLocalhost: !isProduction, // Block localhost only in production\n424\t    })\n425\t  );\n426\t\n427\t  // Distributed tracing for all requests\n428\t  app.use(\"*\", tracingMiddleware);\n429\t\n430\t  // Request size limits for all routes (DoS protection)\n431\t  app.use(\"*\", requestSizeLimits());\n432\t\n433\t  // Input sanitization for all API routes (XSS, SQL injection prevention)\n434\t  app.use(\"/api/*\", inputSanitization());\n435\t\n436\t  // JSON depth protection for API routes (OWASP A01, A03)\n437\t  // Prevents DoS via deeply nested JSON structures\n438\t  app.use(\"/api/*\", jsonDepthProtection());\n439\t\n440\t  // Optional authentication for all API routes\n441\t  // Parses Authorization header and sets auth context if present\n442\t  // Individual routes can require specific permissions using requirePermission\n443\t  app.use(\"/api/*\", optionalAuth({ allowSessions: true }));\n444\t\n445\t  // CSRF protection for state-changing operations\n446\t  // Excludes health, metrics, and safe read-only endpoints\n447\t  // NOTE: /api/context, /api/auth/oauth, /api/auth/mfa, /api/auth/session are disabled\n448\t  // NOTE: /api/auth/password is enabled for password reset functionality\n449\t  app.use(\n450\t    \"/api/*\",\n451\t    csrfProtection({\n452\t      excludePaths: [\n453\t        \"/api/health\",\n454\t        \"/api/metrics\",\n455\t        \"/api/stations\",\n456\t        \"/api/routes\",\n457\t        \"/api/static\",\n458\t        \"/api/arrivals\",\n459\t        \"/api/alerts\",\n460\t        \"/api/equipment\",\n461\t        \"/api/trip\",\n462\t        \"/api/positions\",\n463\t        \"/api/push/vapid-public-key\",\n464\t        \"/api/journal\",\n465\t        // \"/api/context\", // DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n466\t        // \"/api/auth/oauth\", // DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n467\t        // \"/api/auth/mfa\", // DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n468\t        // \"/api/auth/session\", // DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n469\t        \"/api/auth/password\",\n470\t        \"/api/csrf-token\",\n471\t        \"/api/security/csp-report\", // CSP violation reports (browser-initiated)\n472\t      ],\n473\t    })\n474\t  );\n475\t\n476\t  // HPP protection for all API routes (prevents parameter pollution attacks)\n477\t  app.use(\"/api/*\", hppProtection({ strategy: \"first\" }));\n478\t\n479\t  // HTTP metrics collection for all API routes\n480\t  app.use(\"/api/*\", httpMetrics());\n481\t\n482\t  // Rate limiting on all API routes (60 req/min per IP, token bucket)\n483\t  app.use(\"/api/*\", rateLimiter());\n484\t\n485\t  // Response size limits for API routes (OWASP A01, A04)\n486\t  // Prevents DoS via large response payloads\n487\t  app.use(\"/api/*\", responseSizeLimits());\n488\t\n489\t  // Compression for API responses\n490\t  app.use(\"/api/*\", compressionMiddleware());\n491\t\n492\t  const stationToComplex = buildStationToComplexMap(complexes);\n493\t\n494\t  // Create transfer engine for commute analysis\n495\t  const transferEngine = createTransferEngine({\n496\t    stations,\n497\t    routes,\n498\t    transfers,\n499\t    complexes,\n500\t    getArrivals: (stationId: string) => {\n501\t      return getArrivals(stationId);\n502\t    },\n503\t  });\n504\t\n505\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n506\t  // CSRF token endpoint\n507\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n508\t  app.get(\n509\t    \"/api/csrf-token\",\n510\t    cors({\n511\t      allowedOrigins: [\"*\"], // Allow all origins for CSRF token\n512\t      allowedMethods: [\"GET\"],\n513\t      allowedHeaders: [\"Content-Type\", \"Authorization\"],\n514\t    }),\n515\t    (c) => {\n516\t      const token = generateCsrfToken();\n517\t\n518\t      return c.json({ token });\n519\t    }\n520\t  );\n521\t\n522\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n523\t  // Health endpoint\n524\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n525\t  app.get(\"/api/health\", (c) => {\n526\t    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n527\t    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n528\t    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n529\t    const feedStates = getFeedStates();\n530\t    const alertsStatus = getAlertsStatus();\n531\t    const allFeedsOk = feedStates.every(\n532\t      (f) => f.circuitOpenAt === null && f.lastSuccessAt !== null && !f.isStale\n533\t    );\n534\t    const alertsOk = !alertsStatus.circuitOpen && alertsStatus.lastSuccessAt !== null;\n535\t\n536\t    // Count feeds that have been failing for >5 minutes\n537\t    const now = Date.now();\n538\t    const failingFeeds = feedStates.filter(\n539\t      (f) =>\n540\t        f.consecutiveFailures > 0 && f.lastSuccessAt !== null && now - f.lastSuccessAt > 300_000\n541\t    );\n542\t    const unhealthy = failingFeeds.length >= UNHEALTHY_FEED_THRESHOLD;\n543\t\n544\t    const status = allFeedsOk && alertsOk ? \"ok\" : \"degraded\";\n545\t    const httpStatus = unhealthy ? 503 : 200;\n546\t\n547\t    const memUsage = process.memoryUsage();\n548\t    const allMetrics = metrics.getAll();\n549\t\n550\t    // Get cache hit rate from metrics (sum across all label combinations)\n551\t    let cacheHitsValue = 0;\n552\t    let cacheMissesValue = 0;\n553\t    const cacheHitsMap = allMetrics.get(\"cache_hits_total\");\n554\t    const cacheMissesMap = allMetrics.get(\"cache_misses_total\");\n555\t    if (cacheHitsMap) {\n556\t      for (const labeled of cacheHitsMap.values()) {\n557\t        if (labeled.metric.type === \"counter\") {\n558\t          cacheHitsValue += labeled.metric.value;\n559\t        }\n560\t      }\n561\t    }\n562\t    if (cacheMissesMap) {\n563\t      for (const labeled of cacheMissesMap.values()) {\n564\t        if (labeled.metric.type === \"counter\") {\n565\t          cacheMissesValue += labeled.metric.value;\n566\t        }\n567\t      }\n568\t    }\n569\t    const totalCacheRequests = cacheHitsValue + cacheMissesValue;\n570\t    const cacheHitRate =\n571\t      totalCacheRequests > 0 ? Math.round((cacheHitsValue / totalCacheRequests) * 100) / 100 : 0;\n572\t\n573\t    return c.json(\n574\t      {\n575\t        status,\n576\t        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n577\t        uptime_seconds: Math.floor((Date.now() - SERVER_START_MS) / 1000),\n578\t        feeds: feedStates.map((f) => ({\n579\t          id: f.id,\n580\t          name: f.name,\n581\t          status:\n582\t            f.circuitOpenAt !== null\n583\t              ? \"circuit_open\"\n584\t              : f.lastSuccessAt === null\n585\t                ? \"never_polled\"\n586\t                : f.isStale\n587\t                  ? \"stale\"\n588\t                  : \"ok\",\n589\t          lastSuccessAt: f.lastSuccessAt ? new Date(f.lastSuccessAt).toISOString() : null,\n590\t          lastPollAt: f.lastPollAt ? new Date(f.lastPollAt).toISOString() : null,\n591\t          consecutiveFailures: f.consecutiveFailures,\n592\t          entityCount: f.entityCount,\n593\t          lastError: f.lastErrorMessage,\n594\t          tripReplacementPeriod: f.tripReplacementPeriod,\n595\t          avgLatencyMs: avgLatency(f.latencyHistory),\n596\t          errorCount24h: errorCount24h(f.errorTimestamps),\n597\t          parseErrors: f.parseErrors,\n598\t        })),\n599\t        alerts: {\n600\t          count: alertsStatus.alertCount,\n601\t          lastSuccessAt: alertsStatus.lastSuccessAt,\n602\t          matchRate: alertsStatus.matchRate,\n603\t          consecutiveFailures: alertsStatus.consecutiveFailures,\n604\t          circuitOpen: alertsStatus.circuitOpen,\n605\t          unmatchedCount: alertsStatus.unmatchedCount,\n606\t        },\n607\t        delayDetector: getDelayDetectorStatus(),\n608\t        delayPredictor: rssBytes: memUsage.rss,\n614\t          heapUsedBytes: memUsage.heapUsed,\n615\t          heapTotalBytes: memUsage.heapTotal,\n616\t          externalBytes: memUsage.external,\n617\t        },\n618\t        failingFeedsCount: failingFeeds.length,\n619\t      },\n620\t      httpStatus as 200 | 503\n621\t    );\n622\t  });\n623\t\n624\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n625\t  // Metrics export endpoint (for Prometheus)\n626\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n627\t  app.get(\"/api/metrics\", (c) => {\n628\t    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n629\t    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n630\t    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n631\t\n632\t    const metricsText = metrics.exportPrometheus();\n633\t -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n638\t  // CSP violation reporting endpoint\n639\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n640\t  app.post(\"/api/security/csp-report\", async (c) => {\n641\t    try {\n642\t      const report = await c.req.json().catch(() => null);\n643\t\n644\t      if (!report) {\n645\t        return c.json({ error: \"Invalid report\" }, 400);\n646\t      }\n647\t\n648\t      // Log the CSP violation for   response.complexName = complex.name;\n760\t      response.complexStations = complexStations;\n761\t      response.complexLines = Array.from(allLines).sort();\n762\t    }\n763\t\n764\t    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n765\t    return c.json(response);\n766\t  });\n767\t\n768\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n769\t  // requirePermission(\"commutes:create\" as Permission),\n829\t    auditLogAccess(\"commute\", \"create\"),\n830\t    async (c) => {\n831\t      const startTime = Date.now();\n832\t      let success =     if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n839\t\n840\t        const {\n841\t          originId,\n842\t          destinationId,\n843\t          preferredLines = [],\n844\t          commuteId =    preferredLines,\n861\t          commuteId,\n862\t          accessibleMode\n863\t        );\n864\t\n865\t        hasTransfers = analysis.transferRoutes.length > 0;\n866\t        success = true;\n867\t\n868\t        const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n869\t        recordCommuteAnalysisDuration(duration);\n870\t        recordCommuteAnalysisRequest(success, hasTransfers, accessibleMode);\n871\t\n872\t        c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n873\t        return c.json(analysis);\n874\t      } catch (error) {\n875\t        logger.error(\"Commute analysis error\", error instanceof Error ? error : undefined);\n876\t\n877\t        const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n878\t        recordCommuteAnalysisDuration(duration);\n879\t        recordCommuteAnalysisRequest(false, false, accessibleMode);\n880\t\n881\t        return c.json(\n882\t          {\n883\t            error: \"Failed to analyze commute\",\n884\t            message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n885\t          },\n886\t          500\n887\t        );\n888\t      }\n889\t    }\n890\t  );\n891\t\n892\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n893\t  // Alerts\n894\t  // * Hono application: API routes + static asset serving.\n *\n * Routes:\n *   GET /api/health                — per-feed status, circuit-breaker state\n *   GET /api/metrics               — Prometheus metrics export\n *   GET /api/arrivals/:stationId   — real-time arrivals for one station\n *   GET /api/stations              — full GTFS static station list\n *   GET /api/stations/:id          — single station with complex expansion\n *   GET /api/stations/search       — type-ahead search by name, line, or cross-street\n *   GET /api/routes                — full route index\n *   GET /api/static/complexes      — station complexes index\n *   POST /api/commute/analyze      — analyze routes between origin and destination\n *   GET /api/alerts                — all current alerts with status\n *   GET /api/alerts/:lineId        — alerts filtered by line\n *   GET /api/push/vapid-public-key — VAPID public key for push subscription\n *   POST /api/push/subscribe       — register a push subscription\n *   DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe   — remove a push subscription\n *   PATCH /api/push/subscription   — update favorites/quiet hours\n *   GET /api/trip/:tripId          — live trip progress (stop-by-stop)\n *   GET /*                         — serve React PWA from packages/web/dist\n */\n\nimport { readFile } from \"node:fs/promises\";\nimport { join } from \"node:path\";\nimport { createBrotliCompress, createDeflate, createGzip } from \"node:zlib\";\nimport { serveStatic } from \"@hono/node-server/serve-static\";\nimport { CACHE_TTLS } from \"@mta-my-way/shared\";\nimport type {\n  ComplexIndex,\n  RouteIndex,\n  Station,\n  StationComplex,\n  StationIndex,\n  TransferConnection,\n} from \"@mta-my-way/shared\";\nimport {\n  alertsQuerySchema,\n  commuteAnalyzeRequestSchema,\n  commuteIdQuerySchema,\n  complexIdParamsSchema,\n  dateRangeParamsSchema,\n  emptyQuerySchema,\n  equipmentQuerySchema,\n  lineIdParamsSchema,\n  positionsQuerySchema,\n  pushSubscribeRequestSchema,\n  pushUnsubscribeRequestSchema,\n  pushUpdateRequestSchema,\n  routeIdParamsSchema,\n  stationIdParamsSchema,\n  stationSearchQuerySchema,\n  tripCreateRequestSchema,\n  tripIdParamsSchema,\n  tripNotesUpdateRequestSchema,\n  tripQuerySchema,\n} from \"@mta-my-way/shared\";\nimport type { MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\nimport { Hono } from \"hono\";\nimport { getAlertsForLine, getAlertsStatus, getAllAlerts } from \"./alerts-poller.js\";\nimport { avgLatency, errorCount24h, getArrivals, getFeedStates, getPositions } from \"./cache.js\";\n// Context-aware switching service imports - DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n// Uncomment to re-enable context detection functionality.\n// import {\n//   DEFAULT_CONTEXT,\n//   checkContextOwnership,\n//   clearManualOverride,\n//   clearManualOverrideForOwner,\n//   detectAndUpdateContextWithOwner,\n//   getContextByOwner,\n//   getContextOwner,\n//   getContextSettings,\n//   getContextTransitionsForOwner,\n//   getCurrentContext,\n//   updateContextSettings,\n// } from \"./context-service.js\";\nimport { getDelayDetectorStatus, getPredictedAlerts } from \"./delay-detector.js\";\nimport { getDelayPredictorStatus } from \"./delay-predictor.js\";\nimport { getAllEquipment, getEquipmentForStation, getEquipmentStatus } from \"./equipment-poller.js\";\n// Authentication imports - MFA functions disabled: Feature not used by frontend\n// Uncomment to re-enable MFA functionality.\nimport {\n  // createSession,\n  // disableTotp,\n  // enableTotp,\n  // getAuthContext,\n  // setupTotp,\n  // verifyMfaForSession,\n  // verifyTotpCode,\n} from \"./middleware/authentication.js\";\nimport {\n  auditLogAccess,\n  cors,\n  csrfProtection,\n  generateCsrfToken,\n  hostHeaderProtection,\n  hppProtection,\n  httpMethodRestrictions,\n  httpRequestSmuggling,\n  httpResponseSplitting,\n  inputSanitization,\n  jsonDepthProtection,\n  optionalAuth,\n  rateLimiter,\n  requestSizeLimits,\n  requireResourceAccess,\n  requireSameOrigin,\n  responseSizeLimits,\n  securityHeaders,\n  securityLogging,\n  validateBody,\n  validateParams,\n  validateQuery,\n} from \"./middleware/index.js\";\nimport { httpMetrics } from \"./middleware/metrics.js\";\nimport {\n  recordCommuteAnalysisDuration,\n  recordCommuteAnalysisRequest,\n  recordStationSearchDuration,\n  recordStationSearchRequest,\n} from \"./middleware/metrics.js\";\nimport {\n  type Permission,\n  getRbacAuthContext,\n  requireOwnershipOrAdmin,\n  requirePermission,\n} from \"./middleware/rbac.js\";\n// OAuth 2.0 imports - DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n// Uncomment to re-enable OAuth 2.0 authentication functionality.\n// import {\n//   cleanupExpiredStates,\n//   createAuthorizationUrl,\n//   getActiveOAuthProviders,\n//   handleOAuthCallback,\n//   initializeDefaultProviders,\n// } from \"./oauth/index.js\";\nimport { logger } from \"./observability/logger.js\";\nimport { metrics } from \"./observability/metrics.js\";\nimport { tracingMiddleware } from \"./observability/tracing.js\";\nimport { buildLineDiagram } from \"./positions-interpolator.js\";\nimport {\n  getSubscriptionCount,\n  getSubscriptionOwner,\n  removeSubscription,\n  updateSubscriptionFavorites,\n  updateSubscriptionMorningScores,\n  updateSubscriptionQuietHours,\n  upsertSubscription,\n} from \"./push/subscriptions.js\";\nimport { getVapidPublicKey } from \"./push/vapid.js\";\nimport { buildPasswordResetRoutes } from \"./routes/password-reset.routes.js\";\nimport { createTransferEngine } from \"./transfer/index.js\";\nimport { lookupTrip } from \"./trip-lookup.js\";\nimport {\n  calculateCommuteStats,\n  deleteTrip,\n  getTotalTripCount,\n  getTripById,\n  getTrips,\n  recordTrip,\n  updateTripNotes,\n} from \"./trip-tracking.js\";\n\n/** Server start time for uptime calculation */\nconst SERVER_START_MS = Date.now();\n\n/** Number of feeds failing >5 min before returning 503 */\nconst UNHEALTHY_FEED_THRESHOLD = 3;\n\n/** Cache header for static GTFS data */\nconst STATIC_CACHE_HEADER = `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.gtfsStatic}, stale-while-revalidate=${CACHE_TTLS.gtfsStaticStale}`;\n\n/**\n * Common abbreviation mappings for station search\n */\nconst ABBREVIATIONS: Record<string, string> = {\n  sq: \"square\",\n  st: \"street\",\n  ave: \"avenue\",\n  av: \"avenue\",\n  blvd: \"boulevard\",\n  pkwy: \"parkway\",\n  rd: \"road\",\n  dr: \"drive\",\n  ln: \"lane\",\n  ct: \"court\",\n  pl: \"place\",\n  hwy: \"highway\",\n  expwy: \"expressway\",\n  bway: \"broadway\",\n  \"'way\": \"way\",\n};\n\nfunction expandAbbreviations(term: string): string {\n  const lower = term.toLowerCase();\n  if (ABBREVIATIONS[lower]) {\n    return ABBREVIATIONS[lower];\n  }\n  let expanded = term;\n  for (const [abbr, full] of Object.entries(ABBREVIATIONS)) {\n    const regex = new RegExp(`\\\\b${abbr}\\\\b`, \"gi\");\n    expanded = expanded.replace(regex, full);\n  }\n  return expanded;\n}\n\nfunction normalizeForSearch(str: string): string {\n  return str\n    .toLowerCase()\n    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\\s]/g, \"\")\n    .replace(/\\s+/g, \" \")\n    .trim();\n}\n\nfunction stationMatchesQuery(\n  station: Station,\n  normalizedQuery: string,\n  originalQuery: string\n): boolean {\n  const normalizedName = normalizeForSearch(station.name);\n  const expandedQuery = normalizeForSearch(expandAbbreviations(originalQuery));\n  const expandedNormalizedQuery = normalizeForSearch(expandAbbreviations(normalizedQuery));\n\n  if (\n    normalizedName.includes(normalizedQuery) ||\n    normalizedName.includes(expandedQuery) ||\n    normalizedName.includes(expandedNormalizedQuery)\n  ) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  const upperQuery = originalQuery.toUpperCase();\n  if (station.lines.some((line) => line === upperQuery)) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  const expandedName = normalizeForSearch(expandAbbreviations(station.name));\n  if (expandedName.includes(expandedQuery) || expandedName.includes(expandedNormalizedQuery)) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n\nfunction scoreSearchResult(station: Station, query: string): number {\n  const normalizedQuery = normalizeForSearch(query);\n  const normalizedName = normalizeForSearch(station.name);\n  const upperQuery = query.toUpperCase();\n\n  if (station.lines.some((line) => line === upperQuery)) {\n    return 1000;\n  }\n\n  if (normalizedName.startsWith(normalizedQuery)) {\n    return 100;\n  }\n\n  const words = normalizedName.split(/\\s+/);\n  if (words.some((word) => word.startsWith(normalizedQuery))) {\n    return 50;\n  }\n\n  if (normalizedName.includes(normalizedQuery)) {\n    return 10;\n  }\n\n  return 1;\n}\n\nfunction buildStationToComplexMap(complexes: ComplexIndex): Map<string, StationComplex> {\n  const map = new Map<string, StationComplex>();\n  for (const complex of Object.values(complexes)) {\n    for (const stationId of complex.stations) {\n      map.set(stationId, complex);\n    }\n  }\n  return map;\n}\n\n/**\n * @param stations         Pre-loaded GTFS static station index\n * @param routes           Pre-loaded GTFS static route index\n * @param complexes        Pre-loaded station complexes index\n * @param transfers        Pre-loaded transfer connections\n * @param webDistPath      Absolute path to the built React PWA (packages/web/dist)\n */\n/** Cache header for immutable assets (hashed filenames) */\nconst IMMUTABLE_CACHE_HEADER = \"public, max-age=31536000, immutable\";\n\n/**\n * Compression middleware for API responses.\n * Supports brotli, gzip, and deflate based on Accept-Encoding header.\n * Brotli is preferred for best compression ratio.\n */\nfunction compressionMiddleware(): MiddlewareHandler {\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    await next();\n\n    const body = c.res.body;\n    if (!body || c.res.headers.get(\"Content-Encoding\")) return;\n\n    const contentType = c.res.headers.get(\"Content-Type\");\n    if (!contentType?.includes(\"json\") && !contentType?.includes(\"text\")) return;\n\n    const acceptEncoding = c.req.header(\"Accept-Encoding\") || \"\";\n    const contentLength = c.res.headers.get(\"Content-Length\");\n\n    // Skip small responses (not worth compressing)\n    if (contentLength && parseInt(contentLength, 10) < 500) return;\n\n    // Clone response to get the body as buffer\n    const buffer = Buffer.from(await c.res.clone().arrayBuffer());\n\n    // Prefer brotli for best compression, then gzip, then deflate\n    if (acceptEncoding.includes(\"br\")) {\n      const brotlied = await new Promise<Buffer>((resolve, reject) => {\n        const chunks: Buffer[] = [];\n        const brotli = createBrotliCompress();\n        brotli.on(\"data\", (chunk) => chunks.push(chunk));\n        brotli.on(\"end\", () => resolve(Buffer.concat(chunks)));\n        brotli.on(\"error\", reject);\n        brotli.end(buffer);\n      });\n\n      c.res = new Response(brotlied, {\n        status: c.res.status,\n        headers: c.res.headers,\n      });\n      c.res.headers.set(\"Content-Encoding\", \"br\");\n      c.res.headers.delete(\"Content-Length\");\n    } else if (acceptEncoding.includes(\"gzip\")) {\n      const gzipped = await new Promise<Buffer>((resolve, reject) => {\n        const chunks: Buffer[] = [];\n        const gzip = createGzip();\n        gzip.on(\"data\", (chunk) => chunks.push(chunk));\n        gzip.on(\"end\", () => resolve(Buffer.concat(chunks)));\n        gzip.on(\"error\", reject);\n        gzip.end(buffer);\n      });\n\n      c.res = new Response(gzipped, {\n        status: c.res.status,\n        headers: c.res.headers,\n      });\n      c.res.headers.set(\"Content-Encoding\", \"gzip\");\n      c.res.headers.delete(\"Content-Length\");\n    } else if (acceptEncoding.includes(\"deflate\")) {\n      const deflated = await new Promise<Buffer>((resolve, reject) => {\n        const chunks: Buffer[] = [];\n        const deflate = createDeflate();\n        deflate.on(\"data\", (chunk) => chunks.push(chunk));\n        deflate.on(\"end\", () => resolve(Buffer.concat(chunks)));\n        deflate.on(\"error\", reject);\n        deflate.end(buffer);\n      });\n\n      c.res = new Response(deflated, {\n        status: c.res.status,\n        headers: c.res.headers,\n      });\n      c.res.headers.set(\"Content-Encoding\", \"deflate\");\n      c.res.headers.delete(\"Content-Length\");\n    }\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if a path has a content hash (for immutable caching).\n * Vite produces files like: assets/index-a1b2c3d4.js\n */\nfunction isHashedAsset(path: string): boolean {\n  // Match pattern: /assets/name-[hash].ext where hash is 8+ hex chars\n  return /\\/assets\\/[^/]+-[a-f0-9]{8,}\\.(js|css|svg|png|jpg|ico|woff2?)$/i.test(path);\n}\n\nexport function createApp(\n  stations: StationIndex,\n  routes: RouteIndex,\n  complexes: ComplexIndex,\n  transfers: Record<string, TransferConnection[]>,\n  webDistPath: string\n): Hono {\n  const app = new Hono();\n\n  // Security headers on all responses (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy)\n  // CSP includes report-uri for violation monitoring at /api/security/csp-report\n  app.use(\n    \"*\",\n    securityHeaders({\n      reportUri: \"/api/security/csp-report\",\n    })\n  );\n\n  // Security logging for all requests (OWASP A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures)\n  // Logs authentication failures, authorization failures, rate limit exceeded, and blocked attacks\n  app.use(\"*\", securityLogging());\n\n  // HTTP method restrictions (OWASP A01, A05)\n  // Blocks dangerous HTTP methods (TRACE, CONNECT) that could be used for attacks\n  app.use(\"*\", httpMethodRestrictions());\n\n  // HTTP Request Smuggling protection (OWASP A01, A03)\n  // Detects and blocks request smuggling attempts\n  app.use(\"*\", httpRequestSmuggling());\n\n  // HTTP Response Splitting protection (OWASP A01, A03)\n  // Detects and blocks CRLF injection attempts\n  app.use(\"*\", httpResponseSplitting());\n\n  // Host header protection to prevent cache poisoning and password reset poisoning\n  // In production, set ALLOWED_HOSTS environment variable to restrict allowed hosts\n  const isProduction = process.env[\"NODE_ENV\"] === \"production\";\n  const allowedHosts = process.env[\"ALLOWED_HOSTS\"]\n    ? process.env[\"ALLOWED_HOSTS\"].split(\",\")\n    : undefined;\n  app.use(\n    \"*\",\n    hostHeaderProtection({\n      allowedHosts,\n      blockMissingHost: isProduction, // Only require Host header in production\n      blockIpAddresses: isProduction,\n      blockPrivateNetworks: isProduction,\n      blockLocalhost: !isProduction, // Block localhost only in production\n    })\n  );\n\n  // Distributed tracing for all requests\n  app.use(\"*\", tracingMiddleware);\n\n  // Request size limits for all routes (DoS protection)\n  app.use(\"*\", requestSizeLimits());\n\n  // Input sanitization for all API routes (XSS, SQL injection prevention)\n  app.use(\"/api/*\", inputSanitization());\n\n  // JSON depth protection for API routes (OWASP A01, A03)\n  // Prevents DoS via deeply nested JSON structures\n  app.use(\"/api/*\", jsonDepthProtection());\n\n  // Optional authentication for all API routes\n  // Parses Authorization header and sets auth context if present\n  // Individual routes can require specific permissions using requirePermission\n  app.use(\"/api/*\", optionalAuth({ allowSessions: true }));\n\n  // CSRF protection for state-changing operations\n  // Excludes health, metrics, and safe read-only endpoints\n  // NOTE: /api/context, /api/auth/oauth, /api/auth/mfa, /api/auth/session are disabled\n  // NOTE: /api/auth/password is enabled for password reset functionality\n  app.use(\n    \"/api/*\",\n    csrfProtection({\n      excludePaths: [\n        \"/api/health\",\n        \"/api/metrics\",\n        \"/api/stations\",\n        \"/api/routes\",\n        \"/api/static\",\n        \"/api/arrivals\",\n        \"/api/alerts\",\n        \"/api/equipment\",\n        \"/api/trip\",\n        \"/api/positions\",\n        \"/api/push/vapid-public-key\",\n        \"/api/journal\",\n        // \"/api/context\", // DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n        // \"/api/auth/oauth\", // DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n        // \"/api/auth/mfa\", // DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n        // \"/api/auth/session\", // DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n        \"/api/auth/password\",\n        \"/api/csrf-token\",\n        \"/api/security/csp-report\", // CSP violation reports (browser-initiated)\n      ],\n    })\n  );\n\n  // HPP protection for all API routes (prevents parameter pollution attacks)\n  app.use(\"/api/*\", hppProtection({ strategy: \"first\" }));\n\n  // HTTP metrics collection for all API routes\n  app.use(\"/api/*\", httpMetrics());\n\n  // Rate limiting on all API routes (60 req/min per IP, token bucket)\n  app.use(\"/api/*\", rateLimiter());\n\n  // Response size limits for API routes (OWASP A01, A04)\n  // Prevents DoS via large response payloads\n  app.use(\"/api/*\", responseSizeLimits());\n\n  // Compression for API responses\n  app.use(\"/api/*\", compressionMiddleware());\n\n  const stationToComplex = buildStationToComplexMap(complexes);\n\n  // Create transfer engine for commute analysis\n  const transferEngine = createTransferEngine({\n    stations,\n    routes,\n    transfers,\n    complexes,\n    getArrivals: (stationId: string) => {\n      return getArrivals(stationId);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // CSRF token endpoint\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\n    \"/api/csrf-token\",\n    cors({\n      allowedOrigins: [\"*\"], // Allow all origins for CSRF token\n      allowedMethods: [\"GET\"],\n      allowedHeaders: [\"Content-Type\", \"Authorization\"],\n    }),\n    (c) => {\n      const token = generateCsrfToken();\n\n      return c.json({ token });\n    }\n  );\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Health endpoint\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/health\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n    const feedStates = getFeedStates();\n    const alertsStatus = getAlertsStatus();\n    const allFeedsOk = feedStates.every(\n      (f) => f.circuitOpenAt === null && f.lastSuccessAt !== null && !f.isStale\n    );\n    const alertsOk = !alertsStatus.circuitOpen && alertsStatus.lastSuccessAt !== null;\n\n    // Count feeds that have been failing for >5 minutes\n    const now = Date.now();\n    const failingFeeds = feedStates.filter(\n      (f) =>\n        f.consecutiveFailures > 0 && f.lastSuccessAt !== null && now - f.lastSuccessAt > 300_000\n    );\n    const unhealthy = failingFeeds.length >= UNHEALTHY_FEED_THRESHOLD;\n\n    const status = allFeedsOk && alertsOk ? \"ok\" : \"degraded\";\n    const httpStatus = unhealthy ? 503 : 200;\n\n    const memUsage = process.memoryUsage();\n    const allMetrics = metrics.getAll();\n\n    // Get cache hit rate from metrics (sum across all label combinations)\n    let cacheHitsValue = 0;\n    let cacheMissesValue = 0;\n    const cacheHitsMap = allMetrics.get(\"cache_hits_total\");\n    const cacheMissesMap = allMetrics.get(\"cache_misses_total\");\n    if (cacheHitsMap) {\n      for (const labeled of cacheHitsMap.values()) {\n        if (labeled.metric.type === \"counter\") {\n          cacheHitsValue += labeled.metric.value;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    if (cacheMissesMap) {\n      for (const labeled of cacheMissesMap.values()) {\n        if (labeled.metric.type === \"counter\") {\n          cacheMissesValue += labeled.metric.value;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    const totalCacheRequests = cacheHitsValue + cacheMissesValue;\n    const cacheHitRate =\n      totalCacheRequests > 0 ? Math.round((cacheHitsValue / totalCacheRequests) * 100) / 100 : 0;\n\n    return c.json(\n      {\n        status,\n        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n        uptime_seconds: Math.floor((Date.now() - SERVER_START_MS) / 1000),\n        feeds: feedStates.map((f) => ({\n          id: f.id,\n          name: f.name,\n          status:\n            f.circuitOpenAt !== null\n              ? \"circuit_open\"\n              : f.lastSuccessAt === null\n                ? \"never_polled\"\n                : f.isStale\n                  ? \"stale\"\n                  : \"ok\",\n          lastSuccessAt: f.lastSuccessAt ? new Date(f.lastSuccessAt).toISOString() : null,\n          lastPollAt: f.lastPollAt ? new Date(f.lastPollAt).toISOString() : null,\n          consecutiveFailures: f.consecutiveFailures,\n          entityCount: f.entityCount,\n          lastError: f.lastErrorMessage,\n          tripReplacementPeriod: f.tripReplacementPeriod,\n          avgLatencyMs: avgLatency(f.latencyHistory),\n          errorCount24h: errorCount24h(f.errorTimestamps),\n          parseErrors: f.parseErrors,\n        })),\n        alerts: {\n          count: alertsStatus.alertCount,\n          lastSuccessAt: alertsStatus.lastSuccessAt,\n          matchRate: alertsStatus.matchRate,\n          consecutiveFailures: alertsStatus.consecutiveFailures,\n          circuitOpen: alertsStatus.circuitOpen,\n          unmatchedCount: alertsStatus.unmatchedCount,\n        },\n        delayDetector: getDelayDetectorStatus(),\n        delayPredictor: getDelayPredictorStatus(),\n        equipment: getEquipmentStatus(),\n        pushSubscriptions: getSubscriptionCount(),\n        cacheHitRate,\n        memory: {\n          rssBytes: memUsage.rss,\n          heapUsedBytes: memUsage.heapUsed,\n          heapTotalBytes: memUsage.heapTotal,\n          externalBytes: memUsage.external,\n        },\n        failingFeedsCount: failingFeeds.length,\n      },\n      httpStatus as 200 | 503\n    );\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Metrics export endpoint (for Prometheus)\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/metrics\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const metricsText = metrics.exportPrometheus();\n    c.header(\"Content-Type\", \"text/plain; version=0.0.4; charset=utf-8\");\n    return c.text(metricsText);\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // CSP violation reporting endpoint\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.post(\"/api/security/csp-report\", async (c) => {\n    try {\n      const report = await c.req.json().catch(() => null);\n\n      if (!report) {\n        return c.json({ error: \"Invalid report\" }, 400);\n      }\n\n      // Log the CSP violation for security monitoring\n      logger.warn(\"CSP violation detected\", {\n        \"user-agent\": c.req.header(\"user-agent\"),\n        referrer: c.req.header(\"referrer\"),\n        \"x-forwarded-for\": c.req.header(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0] ?? \"unknown\",\n        report,\n      });\n\n      // Return 200 to acknowledge the report\n      return c.json({ received: true });\n    } catch (error) {\n      logger.error(\"Failed to process CSP report\", error as Error);\n      return c.json({ error: \"Failed to process report\" }, 400);\n    }\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Real-time arrivals\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/arrivals/:id\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, stationIdParamsSchema);\n    if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n    const { id: stationId } = params;\n    const arrivals = getArrivals(stationId);\n\n    if (!arrivals) {\n      return c.json({ error: \"Station not found or no data yet\" }, 404);\n    }\n\n    // Inject equipment status into arrivals response\n    const equipmentSummary = getEquipmentForStation(stationId);\n    const response = {\n      ...arrivals,\n      equipment: equipmentSummary?.equipment ?? [],\n    };\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n    return c.json(response);\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // GTFS static station data\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/stations\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(Object.values(stations));\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/stations/search\", (c) => {\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n    const query = validateQuery(c, stationSearchQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const { q } = query;\n    const trimmedQuery = q.trim();\n    const normalizedQuery = normalizeForSearch(trimmedQuery);\n\n    const results = Object.values(stations)\n      .filter((station) => stationMatchesQuery(station, normalizedQuery, trimmedQuery))\n      .map((station) => ({\n        station,\n        score: scoreSearchResult(station, trimmedQuery),\n      }))\n      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)\n      .map(({ station }) => station);\n\n    const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n    recordStationSearchDuration(duration);\n    recordStationSearchRequest(results.length);\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(results);\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/stations/:id\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, stationIdParamsSchema);\n    if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n    const { id } = params;\n    const station = stations[id];\n\n    if (!station) {\n      return c.json({ error: \"Station not found\" }, 404);\n    }\n\n    const complex = stationToComplex.get(id);\n\n    const response: Record<string, unknown> = {\n      ...station,\n      complexStations: [] as Station[],\n      complexLines: station.lines,\n    };\n\n    if (complex) {\n      const complexStations = complex.stations\n        .map((sid) => stations[sid])\n        .filter((s): s is Station => s !== undefined);\n\n      const allLines = new Set<string>();\n      for (const s of complexStations) {\n        for (const line of s.lines) {\n          allLines.add(line);\n        }\n      }\n\n      response.complexId = complex.complexId;\n      response.complexName = complex.name;\n      response.complexStations = complexStations;\n      response.complexLines = Array.from(allLines).sort();\n    }\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(response);\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // GTFS static route data\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/routes\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(Object.values(routes));\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/routes/:id\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, routeIdParamsSchema);\n    if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n    const { id } = params;\n    const route = routes[id];\n\n    if (!route) {\n      return c.json({ error: \"Route not found\" }, 404);\n    }\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(route);\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Static GTFS data (complexes)\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/static/complexes\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Commute analysis - requires authentication for personal commute tracking\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.post(\n    \"/api/commute/analyze\",\n    requireResourceAccess(\"commute\", \"create\"),\n    requirePermission(\"commutes:create\" as Permission),\n    auditLogAccess(\"commute\", \"create\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      const startTime = Date.now();\n      let success = false;\n      let hasTransfers = false;\n      const accessibleMode = false;\n\n      try {\n        const body = await validateBody(c, commuteAnalyzeRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        const {\n          originId,\n          destinationId,\n          preferredLines = [],\n          commuteId = \"default\",\n          accessibleMode: accessible = false,\n        } = body;\n\n        const accessibleMode = accessible;\n\n        if (!stations[originId]) {\n          return c.json({ error: `Origin station not found: ${originId}` }, 404);\n        }\n        if (!stations[destinationId]) {\n          return c.json({ error: `Destination station not found: ${destinationId}` }, 404);\n        }\n\n        const analysis = transferEngine.analyzeCommute(\n          originId,\n          destinationId,\n          preferredLines,\n          commuteId,\n          accessibleMode\n        );\n\n        hasTransfers = analysis.transferRoutes.length > 0;\n        success = true;\n\n        const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n        recordCommuteAnalysisDuration(duration);\n        recordCommuteAnalysisRequest(success, hasTransfers, accessibleMode);\n\n        c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n        return c.json(analysis);\n      } catch (error) {\n        logger.error(\"Commute analysis error\", error instanceof Error ? error : undefined);\n\n        const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n        recordCommuteAnalysisDuration(duration);\n        recordCommuteAnalysisRequest(false, false, accessibleMode);\n\n        return c.json(\n          {\n            error: \"Failed to analyze commute\",\n            message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n          },\n          500\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  );\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Alerts\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/alerts\", (c) => {\n    // Validate query parameters to prevent injection attacks\n    const query = validateQuery(c, alertsQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    // Apply filtering if query parameters are provided\n    let officialAlerts = getAllAlerts();\n    if (query.lineId) {\n      officialAlerts = getAlertsForLine(query.lineId);\n    }\n    if (query.activeOnly) {\n      const now = Date.now() / 1000; // Convert to seconds for comparison\n      officialAlerts = officialAlerts.filter((a) => {\n        const start = a.activePeriod.start;\n        const end = a.activePeriod.end;\n        // Alert is active if we're past the start time and either no end or before end\n        return now >= start && (!end || now <= end);\n      });\n    }\n\n    const predictedAlerts = getPredictedAlerts();\n    const status = getAlertsStatus();\n    const delayDetector = getDelayDetectorStatus();\n\n    // Merge official + predicted alerts; predicted are tagged with source field\n    const alerts = [...officialAlerts, ...predictedAlerts];\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n    return c.json({\n      alerts,\n      meta: {\n        count: alerts.length,\n        officialCount: officialAlerts.length,\n        predictedCount: predictedAlerts.length,\n        lastUpdatedAt: status.lastSuccessAt,\n        matchRate: status.matchRate,\n        consecutiveFailures: status.consecutiveFailures,\n        circuitOpen: status.circuitOpen,\n        delayDetector,\n      },\n    });\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/alerts/:lineId\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, lineIdParamsSchema);\n    if a.affectedLines.includes(lineId));\n    const alerts = [...officialAlerts, ...predictedAlerts];\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n    return c.json({ alerts, lineId });\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Equipment (elevator/escalator outages)\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/equipment\", (c) => {\n    // Validate query parameters to prevent injection attacks\n    const query = (query.stationId) {\n      const summary = getEquipmentForStation(query.stationId);\n      return c.json(summary ? { stations: [summary], count: 1 } : { stations: [], count: 0 });\n    }\n    if c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n    return c.json({ stations: summaries, count: summaries.length });\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/equipment/:id\", (c) => {\n    const app.get(\"/api/positions/:lineId\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, lineIdParamsSchema);\n    if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n    const query = validateQuery(c, auditLogAccess(\"subscription\", \"create\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      try {\n        const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n        const body = await validateBody(c, pushSubscribeRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        // Use the authenticated user's keyId as the owner\n        const ownerId = auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n        upsertSubscription(body, ownerId);\n\n        logger.info(\"Push subscription registered\", {\n          lines: body.favorites?.map((f) => f.lines).flat() ?? app.delete(\n    \"/api/push/unsubscribe\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"subscriptions\", {\n      getOwnerId: async (c) => {\n        const body = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n        return getSubscriptionOwner(body.endpoint) || \"\";\n      },\n      adminBypass: true,\n    }),\n    requireResourceAccess(\"subscription\", \"delete\", { adminBypass: true }),\n    auditLogAccess(\"subscription\", \"delete\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      try {\n        const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n        const body = await validateBody(c, pushUnsubscribeRequestSchema);\n     });\n\n        return c.json({ success: true });\n      } catch (err) {\n        logger.error(\"Push subscription removal failed\", err as Error);\n        return c.json({ error: \"Failed to ownerId = auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n\n        if (body.favorites) {\n          updateSubscriptionFavorites(body.endpoint, body.favorites, ownerId);\n        }\n\n        if (body.quietHours) {\n          updateSubscriptionQuietHours(body.endpoint, body.quietHours, ownerId);\n        }\n\n        if (body.morningScores) {\n          updateSubscriptionMorningScores(body.endpoint, journal API (Phase 5)\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  // Apply same-origin protection to all trip tracking operations\n  app.use(\"/api/trips*\", requireSameOrigin());\n  app.use(\"/api/journal/*\", requireSameOrigin());\n\n  /** Record a trip in the journal */\n  app.post(\n    \"/api/trips\",\n    requireResourceAccess(\"trip\", \"create\"),\n    auditLogAccess(\"trip\", \"create\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      try {\n        const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n        const body = await validateBody(c, tripCreateRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        // Debug: log the full parsed body before destructuring\n        console.log(\"DEBUG: parsed body from validateBody:\", JSON.stringify(body));\n\n        const {\n          date,\n          origin,\n          destination,\n          line,\n          departureTime,\n          arrivalTime,\n          actualDurationMinutes: providedActualDuration,\n          scheduledDurationMinutes,\n          notes,\n        } = body;\n\n        // Debug: log the received scheduledDurationMinutes\n        console.log(\"DEBUG: received scheduledDurationMinutes:\", scheduledDurationMinutes);\n\n        // Calculate actual duration if not provided\n        const actualDurationMinutes =\n          providedActualDuration ?? Math.round((arrivalTime - departureTime) / 60);\n\n        // Convert station IDs to station objects\n        const originStation = stations[origin];\n        const destStation = stations[destination];\n        if (!originStation || !destStation) {\n          return c.json({ error: \"Invalid station ID\" }, 400);\n        }\n\n        // Use authenticated user's keyId as owner\n        const ownerId = auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n        const trip = recordTrip(\n          {\n            date: date ?? new Date(departureTime * 1000).toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]!,\n            origin: { stationId: origin, stationName: originStation.name },\n            destination: { stationId: destination, stationName: destStation.name },\n            line,\n            departureTime,\n            arrivalTime,\n            actualDurationMinutes,\n            scheduledDurationMinutes,\n            source: \"manual\",\n            notes,\n          },\n          ownerId\n        );\n\n        if (!trip) {\n          return c.json({ error: \"Failed to record trip\" }, 500);\n        }\n\n        c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"no-cache\");\n        return c.json({ success: true, trip }, 201);\n      } catch (error) {\n        logger.error(\"Trip recording failed\", error as Error);\n        return c.json(\n          {\n            error: \"Failed to record trip\",\n            message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n          },\n          500\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Get trips from the journal with optional filters */\n  app.get(\"/api/trips\", requirePermission(\"trips:read:own\" as Permission), (c) => {\n    const query = validateQuery(c, tripQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n\n    // Non-admin users can only see their own trips\n    const trips = getTrips({\n      ...query,\n      ownerId: auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\",\n    });\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=15\");\n    return c.json({\n      trips,\n      count: trips.length,\n      limit: query.limit ?? 50,\n      offset: query.offset ?? 0,\n    });\n  });\n\n  /** Get a single trip by ID */\n  app.get(\n    \"/api/trips/:tripId\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"trips\", {\n      getOwnerId: (c) => {\n        const tripId = c.req.param(\"tripId\");\n        const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n        return trip?.ownerId || \"\";\n      },\n      adminBypass: true,\n    }),\n    (c) => {\n      const params = validateParams(c, tripIdParamsSchema);\n      if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n      const { tripId } = params;\n      const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n\n      if (!trip) {\n        return c.json({ error: \"Trip not found\" }, 404);\n      }\n\n      c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=60\");\n      return c.json(trip);\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Update trip notes */\n  app.patch(\n    \"/api/trips/:tripId/notes\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"trips\", {\n      getOwnerId: (c) => {\n        const tripId = c.req.param(\"tripId\");\n        const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n        return trip?.ownerId || \"\";\n      },\n    }),\n    requireResourceAccess(\"trip\", \"update\"),\n    auditLogAccess(\"trip\", \"update\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n      const params = validateParams(c, tripIdParamsSchema);\n      if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n      const body = await validateBody(c, tripNotesUpdateRequestSchema);\n      if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n      const { tripId } = params;\n      const { notes } = body;\n\n      // Pass ownerId for defense-in-depth check (middleware already validated)\n      const ownerId = auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n      const success = updateTripNotes(tripId, notes, ownerId);\n\n      if (!success) {\n        return c.json({ error: \"Trip not found\" }, 404);\n      }\n\n      return c.json({ success: true });\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Delete a trip from the journal */\n  app.delete(\n    \"/api/trips/:tripId\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"trips\", {\n      getOwnerId: (c) => {\n        const tripId = c.req.param(\"tripId\");\n        const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n        return trip?.ownerId || \"\";\n      },\n    }),\n    requireResourceAccess(\"trip\", \"delete\"),\n    auditLogAccess(\"trip\", \"delete\"),\n    (c) => {\n      const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n      const params = validateParams(c, tripIdParamsSchema);\n      if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n      const { tripId } = params;\n\n      // Pass ownerId for defense-in-depth check (middleware already validated)\n      const ownerId = auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n      const success = deleteTrip(tripId, ownerId);\n\n      if (!success) {\n        return c.json({ error: \"Trip not found\" }, 404);\n      }\n\n      return c.json({ success: true });\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Get commute statistics */\n  app.get(\"/api/journal/stats\", requirePermission(\"journals:read:own\" as Permission), (c) => {\n    const query = validateQuery(c, commuteIdQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n    const commuteId = query.commuteId ?? \"default\";\n\n    // Non-admin users can only see their own stats\n    const stats = calculateCommuteStats(\n      commuteId,\n      auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\"\n    );\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=60\");\n    return c.json(stats);\n  });\n\n  /** Get trips for a specific date range */\n  app.get(\n    \"/api/journal/dates/:startDate/:endDate\",\n    requirePermission(\"journals:read:own\" as Permission),\n    (c) => {\n      const params = validateParams(c, dateRangeParamsSchema);\n      if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n      const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n      const { startDate, endDate } = params;\n\n      // Non-admin users can only see their own trips\n      const ownerId = auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n      const trips = getTrips({ startDate, endDate, limit: 1000, ownerId });\n\n      c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=30\");\n      return c.json({\n        startDate,\n        endDate,\n        trips,\n        count: trips.length,\n      });\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Get journal summary (recent trips + stats) */\n  app.get(\"/api/journal/summary\", requirePermission(\"journals:read:own\" as Permission), (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n    const ownerId = auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n\n    const recentTrips = getTrips({ limit: 10, ownerId });\n    const stats = calculateCommuteStats(\"default\", ownerId);\n\n    // Non-admin users only get their own trip count\n    const totalTrips =\n      auth?.role === \"admin\" ? getTotalTripCount() : getTrips({ limit: 1000000, ownerId }).length;\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=30\");\n    return c.json({\n      recentTrips,\n      stats,\n      totalTrips,\n    });\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Context-aware switching API (Phase 5) - DISABLED: Feature not used by frontend\n could exhaust bandwidth, memory, or cause client-side issues.\n9\t *\n10\t * Attack scenarios:\n11\t * - Malicious backend or data source returns extremely large responses\n12\t * - Accidentally large responses from bugs cause service degradation\n13\t * - Memory exhaustion from buffering large responses\n14\t * - Bandwidth exhaustion affecting other clients\n15\t *\n16\t * This middleware limits response body size and streams responses\n17\t * when possible to avoid buffering large payloads in memory.\n18\t */\n19\t\n20\timport type { MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\n21\timport { securityLogger } from \"./security-logging.js\";\n22\t\n23\t/**\n24\t * Response size limit options.\n25\t */\n26\tinterface ResponseSizeLimitOptions {\n27\t  /** Maximum response body size in bytes (default: 10MB) */\n28\t  maxResponseSize?: number;\n29\t  /** Maximum response body size for JSON responses (default: 1MB) */\n30\t  maxJsonSize?: number;\n31\t  /** Stream responses larger than this threshold (default: 100KB) */\n32\t  streamThreshold?: number;\n33\t  /** Skip validation for these paths (default: []) */\n34\t  excludePaths?: string[];\n35\t  /** Whether to compress large number | undefined {\n53\t  const contentLength = response.headers.get(\"Content-Length\");\n54\t  if (contentLength) {\n55\t    const size = parseInt(contentLength, 10);\n56\t    return isNaN(size) ? undefined : size;\n57\t  }\n58\t  return undefined;\n59\t}\n60\t\n61\t/**\n62\t * Check if response should be streamed based on content type and size.\n63\t */\n64\tfunction shouldStream(\n65\t  contentType: string | null,\n66\t  estimatedSize: number | undefined,\n67\t  options: Required<Omit<ResponseSizeLimitOptions, \"excludePaths\">>\n68\t): boolean {\n69\t  if (!estimatedSize) {\n70\t \"application/pdf\",\n85\t      \"application/zip\",\n86\t    ];\n87\t    if (streamTypes.some((type) => contentType.startsWith(type))) {\n88\t      return true;\n89\t    }\n90\t  }\n91\t\n92\t  return false;\n93\t}\n94\t\n95\t/**\n96\t * Response size limit middleware.\n97\t *\n98\t * Validates response body size and applies appropriate limits\n99\t * based on content type. Streams large responses to avoid buffering.\n100\t */\n101\texport function responseSizeLimits(options: ResponseSizeLimitOptions = {}): MiddlewareHandler {\n102\t  const {\n103\t    maxResponseSize,\n104\t    maxJsonSize,\n105\t    streamThreshold,\n106\t    excludePaths = [],\n107\t    compressLargeResponses,\n108\t  } = {\n109\t    ...DEFAULT_OPTIONS,\n110\t    ...options,\n111\t  };\n112\t\n113\t  return async (c, next) => {\n114\t    // Skip if path is excluded\n115\t    if (excludePaths.some((path) => c.req.path.startsWith(path))) {\n116\t      return next();\n117\t    }\n118\t\n119\t    // Store original json method\n120\t    const originalJson = c.json.bind(c);\n121\t\n122\t    // Override json method to check response size\n123\t    c.json = (data: unknown, status = 200, headers = {}) => {\n124\t      const response = originalJson(data, status, headers);\n125\t\n126\t      // Estimate JSON size\n127\t      const jsonString = JSON.stringify(data);\n128\t      const jsonSize = new TextEncoder().encode(jsonString).length;\n129\t\n130\t      // Check JSON size limit\n131\t      if (jsonSize > maxJsonSize) {\n132\t        securityLogger.logBlockedAttack(c, \"json_response_size_limit\", {\n133\t          actualSize: jsonSize,\n134\t          maxSize: maxJsonSize,\n135\t        });\n136\t        return 413\n143\t        );\n144\t      }\n145\t\n146\t      return response;\n147\t    };\n148\t\n149\t    await next();\n150\t\n151\t    // Check response size after handler executes\n152\t    const limit based on content type\n157\t    let maxSize = maxResponseSize;\n158\t    if (contentType?.includes(\"application/json\")) {\n159\t      maxSize = maxJsonSize;\n160\t    }\n161\t\n162\t    // Check if size limit is exceeded\n163\t    if (estimatedSize && estimatedSize > maxSize) {\n164\t      securityLogger.logBlockedAttack(c, \"response_size_limit\", {\n165\t        actualSize: estimatedSize,\n166\t        maxSize,\n167\t        contentType,\n168\t      });\n169\t\n170\t      // Override response with error\n171\t      c.res = originalJson(\n172\t        {\n173\t Add compression hint for large responses\n183\t    if (estimatedSize && estimatedSize > streamThreshold && compressLargeResponses) {\n184\t      const acceptEncoding = middleware\n187\t        c.res.headers.set(\"X-Should-Compress\", \"true\");\n188\t      }\n189\t    }\n190\t\n191\t    // Log large responses for monitoring\n192\t    if (estimatedSize && estimatedSize > 1024 * 1024) {\n193\t      // Log responses > 1MB\n194\t      securityLogger.logSecurityEvent(c, \"large_response\", {\n195\t        size: estimatedSize,\n196\t        contentType: contentType || \"unknown\",\n197\t      });\n198\t    }\n199\t  };\n200\t}\n201\t\n202\t/**\n203\t * Create a streaming response handler.\n204\t *\n205\t * Use this for responses that should be streamed to avoid buffering.\n206\t */\n207\texport function createStreamResponse(\n208\t  streamGenerator: () => ReadableStream<Uint8Array>,\n209\t  contentType: string,\n210\t  headers: Record<string, string> = {}\n211\t): Response {\n212\t  return new Response(streamGenerator(), {\n213\t    headers: {\n214\t      \"Content-Type\": contentType,\n215\t      \"Transfer-Encoding\": \"chunked\",\n216\t      \"X-Content-Streamed\": \"true\",\n217\t      ...headers,\n218\t    },\n219\t  });\n220\t}\n221\t\n222\t/**\n223\t * Paginated response helper.\n224\t *\n225\t * Helps break large responses into paginated chunks.\n226\t */\n227\texport interface PaginatedResponse<T> {\n228\t  data: T[];\n229\t  pagination: {\n230\t    page: number;\n231\t    pageSize: number;\n232\t    totalCount: number;\n233\t    hasMore: boolean;\n234\t  };\n235\t}\n236\t\n237\t/**\n238\t * Create a paginated response from a large dataset.\n239\t */\n240\texport function createPaginatedResponse<T>(\n241\t  data: T[],\n242\t  page: number,\n243\t  pageSize: number\n244\t): PaginatedResponse<T> {\n245\t  const offset = (page - 1) * pageSize;\n246\t  const paginatedData = data.slice(offset, offset + pageSize);\n247\t  const totalCount = data.length;\n248\t  const hasMore = offset + pageSize < totalCount;\n249\t\n250\t  return {\n251\t    data: paginatedData,\n252\t    pagination: {\n253\t      page,\n254\t      pageSize,\n255\t      totalCount,\n256\t      hasMore,\n257\t    },\n258\t  };\n259\t}\n260\t\n261\t/**\n262\t * Response payload size estimator utility.\n263\t *\n264\t * Estimates the size of a data payload before sending it as JSON.\n265\t */\n266\texport function estimatePayloadSize(data: unknown): number {\n267\t  if (data === null || data === undefined) {\n268\t    return 4; // \"null\"\n269\t  }\n270\t\n271\t  if (typeof data === \"string\") {\n272\t    return new TextEncoder().encode(data).length;\n273\t  }\n274\t\n275\t  if (typeof data === \"number\") {\n276\t    return data.toString().length;\n277\t  }\n278\t\n279\t  if (typeof data === \"boolean\") {\n280\t    return data ? 4 : 5; // \"true\" or \"false\"\n281\t  }\n282\t\n283\t  if (Array.isArray(data)) {\n284\t    return data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + estimatePayloadSize(item), 2); // 2 for brackets\n285\t  }\n286\t\n287\t  if (typeof data === \"object\") {\n288\t    let size = 2; // 2 for braces\n289\t    const entries = Object.entries(data);\n290\t    entries.forEach(([key, value], index) => {\n291\t      size += new TextEncoder().encode(key).length + 3; // key + \":\"\n292\t      size += estimatePayloadSize(value);\n293\t      if (index < entries.length - 1) {\n294\t        size += 1; // \",\"\n295\t      }\n296\t    });\n297\t    return size;\n298\t  }\n299\t\n300\t  return
